headline: Textron Aviation Defense Awarded Five-Year Sustaining Engineering and Program Management Contract for Beechcraft T-6 Texan II Fleet
summary: WICHITA, Kan., April 13, 2026--Textron Aviation Defense continues to support sustainment of more than 700 Beechcraft T-6 Texan II aircraft under a renewed five‑year SEPM contract

headline: Bell selects five RTX systems for U.S Army's Future Long Range Assault Aircraft
summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has been awarded multiple contracts from Bell Textron Inc., a Textron Inc. company, to deliver five critical systems for the U.S. Army's MV-75 Future Long Range Assault Aircraft (FLRAA).

headline: Cessna Piston Fleet Capabilities Strengthened Through New Flight Deck and System Upgrades
summary: WICHITA - Textron Aviation Inc., a Textron Inc. company, today announced a suite of new enhancements for its Cessna piston lineup, including the Cessna Skyhawk, Cessna Skylane, Cessna Turbo Skylane...

headline: Textron Extends T 6 Contract As Global Orders Shape Growth Story
summary: Textron (NYSE:TXT) has secured a major modification to its T 6 military aircraft contract with the U.S. Air Force, lifting the contract ceiling to US$510 million and extending services through April 2031. Textron Aviation is adding international orders, including Belgium's first military purchase of five Cessna SkyCouriers, a Beechcraft King 360C order from the Peruvian Army, and fleet expansion in Indonesia. The company is also rolling out new product features, such as an In Flight Operable...
